nonBlockingIssues.description: N+1 query pattern in listServiceRequests: each request triggers 3 separate DB queries for procedureType, citizen, and activeBooking
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Use drizzle's eager loading via 'with' clause or batch load related entities to reduce query count from O(n*3) to O(1) or O(3)

suggestions.description: Switch statement for timestampField could be simplified using a map/object
